name: mari
description: Curate, search, and share your team's product knowledge layer — local hybrid search over Slack, GitHub, Google Drive, Jira, Confluence, Zendesk, Salesforce, HubSpot, Microsoft 365, Discord, Linear, Granola, git history, and local files — plus a deterministic prose-quality detector, editorial verbs, factchecking, and post-edit hooks.

plugins.name: mari
plugins.description: Local-first knowledge curation and prose-quality plugin. /search, /sync, /tag, /factcheck, /audit, /deslop, /tighten, /clarify, and more. Wraps the `mari` binary; data stays under ~/.mari.
